title: InventoryEntry
description: An inventory entry tracking available quantity for a specific SKU, optionally scoped to a supply channel.

version.description: Current version for optimistic concurrency control.

sku.description: SKU of the product variant this inventory entry tracks.

availableQuantity.description: Quantity available for ordering (stock minus reservations).

restockableInDays.description: Expected days until out-of-stock items are restocked.
